description: An expandable accordion component with a section heading and multiple collapsible panels. Each panel has a question/title header that expands to reveal answer/body content. Used for FAQ sections.

FR-01.title: Section Heading
FR-01.description: The block MUST display an H2 section heading above the accordion.

FR-02.title: Expandable Panels
FR-02.description: The block MUST render multiple expandable/collapsible panels.
acceptance: Each panel has a clickable header (question/title)
Only one panel open at a time (optional mutual exclusion)

FR-03.title: Panel Header
FR-03.description: Each panel header MUST display the question or title text with an expand/collapse indicator.
acceptance: Expand/collapse icon (chevron or plus/minus) on the right
Icon rotates or changes on toggle

FR-04.title: Panel Content
FR-04.description: Each expanded panel MUST display the answer or body content.
acceptance: Rich text content: paragraphs, lists, links
Content hidden from view (and screen readers) when collapsed

FR-05.title: Desktop Tab Variant
FR-05.description: On desktop, the accordion MAY render as tabbed panels (show-tabs-desktop behavior).
acceptance: Tabs displayed horizontally on desktop viewports
Content area updates based on selected tab

accessibility.AC-01: Panel headers MUST use button elements with aria-expanded attribute
accessibility.AC-02: Panel content MUST have aria-hidden when collapsed
accessibility.AC-03: Keyboard navigation: Enter/Space toggles panel, Arrow keys navigate between headers
accessibility.AC-04: Focus MUST move logically through panels
